problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
mechanism: Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene
hypothesis: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Viral. Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 16 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
